description_long: This is a white SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, featuring a prominent eagle graphic on both side doors. The vehicle has a rugged appearance, with yellow accents on the bumpers, mirrors, and wheel rims, and a visible spare tire mounted on the rear door. The windows are dark, and the body panels show some weathering or patina, giving it a slightly aged look. The front grille is robust, with a protective bar, and the headlights are square and set into the body. The wheels are large, with thick tires suitable for off-road or urban driving. The overall style suggests a classic or vintage off-road SUV, possibly inspired by models from the late 20th century.
description: A white, boxy SUV with yellow accents, eagle graphics on the sides, and a rear-mounted spare tire. The vehicle has a rugged, vintage look with large wheels and a protective front grille.
description_view_0: Side view showing the eagle graphic, yellow-accented wheels, and clear door/window details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the protective grille, square headlights, and yellow bumper accents.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with eagle graphic, matching wheel design, and visible door/window structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the spare tire with yellow rim, rear window, and bumper details.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke wheels with yellow and black accents, thick rim, and rugged off-road tire tread
